summary: Revision phase completed for all 22 chapters. Chapters 1-7 were previously revised. Chapters 8-22 processed through the full editorial pipeline (developmental edit → line edit → copy edit → chapter revision → revision audit). All chapters passed the revision audit gate. Chapter 22 required one retry after the initial audit identified unaddressed critical findings (negation-contrast saturation, grip image reuse, traceability errors, surviving darlings); the re-revision resolved all issues and passed on the second attempt.

chapter22.resolution: Passed on second attempt after re-revision
